name: HR managers in retail companies using Shopify for workforce management tool
description: For HR managers in retail companies using Shopify processing 10-20 shifts/week, inaccurate labor forecasting causes understaffing, leading to poor customer service. We provide automated shift scheduling instead of manual scheduling and Excel spreadsheets.
target_audience: HR managers in retail companies using Shopify for workforce management
problem_solved: Inaccurate labor forecasting leading to understaffing or overstaffing.
